task_completion.description: Navigate to the Event Rules section in the Nx Witness VMS Web Admin interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the Nx Witness VMS interface with the 'Event Rules' or 'Rules' configuration page open.

task_completion.description: Set the event trigger to Motion on the Loading Dock Camera.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the rule configuration, the Event type is set to 'Motion' (or similar) and the source/camera is set to 'Loading Dock Camera'.

task_completion.description: Set the action to Play Sound on the Loading Dock Camera.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the rule configuration, the Action type is set to 'Play Sound' (or similar audio action) and the target camera is set to 'Loading Dock Camera'.

task_completion.description: Set the minimum interval between actions to 1 minute.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An interval setting in the rule configuration is set to '1 minute' or '60 seconds'.

task_completion.description: Save the rule and ensure it is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The configured rule is visible in the list of event rules, with a toggle or checkbox indicating it is 'Enabled', and no unsaved changes indicator.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to configure the rule.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Nx Witness web interface in a browser, not terminal commands (like curl) interacting with the API.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Nx Witness VMS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches a typical VMS web admin dashboard, not a text editor or a locally created mock HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no visible Python or shell scripts written to send API requests directly to the VMS.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target camera name is exactly 'Loading Dock Camera'. In the GUI, look for Event type 'Motion' (API: cameraMotionEvent) and Action type 'Play Sound' (API: playSoundAction). The interval must be exactly 1 minute (60 seconds).
